{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Class Three Fiend
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Class Three Fiend]] was crushed by [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Class Three [[Fiends]] are not threats to a full, stable [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
